titleStmt.title: SII 39.184: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 184. (A.R. No. 184 of 1916.) TIRUPPUKKUḺI, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. VIJAYARAGHAVAPERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL KŌṈĒRIṈMAIKOṆḌĀṈ-8TH YEAR.

summary.p: This inscription records the gift of the village Oṭṭaittāṅgal alias Pōreṟṟi to the temple of Vijayarāghava perumāḷ at Tiruppuṭkuḻi in Dāmarkōṭṭam, a subdivision of Toṇḍaimaṇḍalam in accordance with a previous grant made by Rājarāja Sambuvarāyaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī koneriṉmai koṇṭāṉ toṇṭaimaṇṭalattu tāmar koṭṭattu tiruppuṭkuḻiyil vijayarākavap peru
māḷ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam Oṭṭaittāṅkal Āṉa poreṟṟiṉatāṅkal Ūravarkku muṉpi lāṇṭukaḷḷum Irācarāca campuvarā
yar Ōlaippaṭi Innāyaṉārkku tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāy pontapaṭiye Eṭṭāvatu mutalakaramum Ivvūr nārpāṟ kellaikkuṭpaṭṭa
naṉcey puṉceyyum Itukku Irukkuṅ kaṭamai Antarāyam Uḷḷiṭṭa Aṉaittāyavarkkamum Uṭpaṭa mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiyili Ākak ku
ṭuttom Ippaṭikku Ivōlai piṭipāṭāka koṇṭu muṉpi lāṇṭukaḷum Iruntu pontapaṭiye tiruppati śrī vayi
ṣṇavarkaḷḷuk kokaṭamai kuṭimaipokka Ivai yātavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vaḻutiyat taraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai mātavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 39.184 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
